    • Uses of PeselNumber.Gender in net.datafaker

      Methods in net.datafaker with parameters of type PeselNumber.Gender 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String IdNumber.peselNumber(java.time.LocalDate birthDate, PeselNumber.Gender gender)
      Generates a valid PESEL number for a person with given gender and birth date.
